content:
Dear Volunteers,

A huge thank you to everyone who has contributed to the translation project! 
Please take a moment to double-check the following:

**Name Accuracy:** Is your name listed correctly on the left? If it's missing, or if you would prefer to be credited by a different name, please let us know.
**UID Accuracy:** Is the UID next to your name correct? This is essential for us to send the exclusive volunteer avatar frame to your account. 

At the moment we are missing UID for the following volunteers: **ghostboots, Kainoxis, MarcosWG, Podhorodetskyi Sergey**.

Please review your details by **October 30, 2025.** We appreciate your help in getting this right!

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/15Xs1KK-_hLKMqHk-Ebv6aflrEzl2j05yxnZINsZWkoM/edit?usp=sharing

@everyone
